zh.lifeSummary: 當John I Lord of Werle於1236年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇維爾時，他的父親Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werle26歲，母親Jutta of Anhalt21歲。他和Sophia of Lindow-Ruppin至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1283年10月15日在他的家鄉享年47歲，埋葬在德國梅可倫波-沃爾包莫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John I Lord of Werle于1236年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇維爾时，他的父亲Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werle26岁，母亲Jutta of Anhalt21岁。他和Sophia of Lindow-Ruppin至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1283年10月15日在他的家乡享年47岁，埋葬在德国梅可倫波-沃爾包莫。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John I Lord of Werle was born in 1236, in Werle, Holy Roman Empire, his father, Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werle, was 26 and his mother, Jutta of Anhalt, was 21. He had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Sophia of Lindow-Ruppin. He died on 15 October 1283, in his hometown, at the age of 47, and was buried in Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John I Lord of Werle est né en 1236, à Werle, Saint-Empire romain, son père, Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werle, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Jutta of Anhalt, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Sophia of Lindow-Ruppin. Il est décédé le 15 octobre 1283, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als John I Lord of Werle 1236 in Werle, Heiliges Römisches Reich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werle 26 und seine Mutter Jutta of Anhalt 21. Er hatte mit Sophia of Lindow-Ruppin mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Oktober 1283 im Alter von 47 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John I Lord of Werle è nato il nel 1236 nel Werle, Heiliges Römisches Reich, il suo padre, Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werle, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Jutta of Anhalt, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Sophia of Lindow-Ruppin. Morì il 15 ottobre 1283, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: John I Lord of Werleが1236年にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチウエルルで生まれた時，父Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werleは26歳，母Jutta of Anhaltは21歳であった。彼はSophia of Lindow-Ruppinとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1283年10月15日に故郷で47歳で死去し，ドイツメックレンブルグ-ボルプオンメルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John I Lord of Werle(이)가 1236년 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 워일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werle(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Jutta of Anhalt(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Sophia of Lindow-Ruppin(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1283년 10월 15일 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 클렌버그-보르폼머에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John I Lord of Werle nasceu em 1236, em Werle, Heiliges Römisches Reich, seu pai, Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werle, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Jutta of Anhalt, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Sophia of Lindow-Ruppin. Ele faleceu em 15 de outubro de 1283, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John I Lord of Werle родился в 1236 г. в местности вирл, хилигесь рoмищесь раич, его отцу по имени Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werle было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Jutta of Anhalt, 21. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Sophia of Lindow-Ruppin. Он умер 15 октября 1283 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности меккленбург-ворпоммирн, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John I Lord of Werle nació en 1236, en Werle, Heiliges Römisches Reich, su papá, Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werle, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Jutta of Anhalt, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Sophia of Lindow-Ruppin. Murió el 15 de octubre de 1283, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemania.
